_source: IGNITE PRODUCTS deck, Goals/Signals/AMPED Solutions Deck, Townsquare Local Marketing Strategies
_description: Complete Townsquare Ignite product suite — all products organized by category with positioning, use cases, and selling language

search_products.name: Search Engine Marketing (SEM)
search_products.goal: Capture active, in-market demand from people searching right now
search_products.positioning: SEM puts your business in front of people who are actively searching for exactly what you offer, right at the moment they're ready to buy.
best_for: High-intent categories: legal, medical, HVAC, auto, home services
Businesses that want measurable leads and phone calls
Categories where customers search before they buy
High lifetime customer value categories
key_benefits: Shows up at the exact moment someone searches for your service
Pay only when someone clicks — budget goes to interested prospects
Call tracking connects keywords to actual phone calls
Measurable ROI — from click to call to customer
Managed by experts — not a set-it-and-forget-it platform
trigger_phrases: I want more calls from people who are actually looking for what we do
I want to show up on Google
My competitor shows up first when people search for my service
I want leads, not just impressions

seller_language.use: booked appointments, service calls, qualified leads, search visibility

search_products.objection_handling: SEM captures people who've already decided they need what you offer — the question is whether they find you or your competitor.

search_products.name: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
search_products.positioning: SEO builds your business's visibility in search results over time — so when people search for your category locally, your name shows up consistently without paying for every click.
best_for: Businesses investing in long-term digital foundation
Businesses with new or under-optimized websites
Local service businesses in competitive categories
Businesses wanting to reduce dependence on paid ads over time
key_benefits: Builds sustainable, long-term search visibility
Complements SEM — organic results increase credibility when ads also appear
Local SEO makes you visible on Google Maps and local search results
Content strategy establishes authority in your category
trigger_phrases: People can't find me online
My website doesn't show up on Google
I want long-term results, not just short-term ads
I want to rank in my city for my services

seller_language.use: local search rankings, organic visibility, Google Maps presence, long-term digital foundation
seller_language.avoid: backlinks, domain authority, meta tags (unless technical audience)

search_products.name: Demand Gen
search_products.goal: Reach potential customers before they start searching — build demand upstream
search_products.positioning: Demand Gen places your brand across Google's visually engaging surfaces — YouTube, Gmail, Discover — connecting with users as they explore content that matches their interests, before they ever search.
best_for: Businesses wanting to build awareness before purchase intent forms
Brands with strong visual or video creative
Complement to SEM for full-funnel Google coverage
Businesses targeting specific audience signals
key_benefits: Reaches people on YouTube, Gmail, and Google Discover simultaneously
Uses Google's AI-driven audience signals and lookalikes
High-impact creative: video and images across premium Google surfaces
Optimized toward clicks, conversions, or ROAS
trigger_phrases: I want to build awareness before people start searching
I want to be on YouTube and Google at the same time
I want smarter Google targeting beyond just search ads

ai_programmatic_products.name: SPARK AI
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Reach the right audience across digital channels with AI-driven targeting and optimization
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: SPARK AI uses artificial intelligence to find and reach your most likely customers across the web — constantly learning and optimizing across Google Search, Google Maps, Gmail, YouTube, and the Google Display Network.
best_for: Businesses that want smart, automated digital targeting
Businesses with a defined customer profile wanting to reach more like their best customers
Businesses looking to expand beyond search and social
Multi-platform reach with single campaign management
key_benefits: AI continuously optimizes who sees your ads based on real performance data
Reaches prospects across Google Search, Google Maps, Gmail, YouTube, and Display Network simultaneously
Campaigns learn over time — get smarter the longer they run
Reduces wasted spend by targeting high-probability audiences
Streamlined campaign reporting across all touchpoints
trigger_phrases: I want to reach more of my target customer
I feel like my ads are going to the wrong people
I want smarter targeting, not just more impressions
I want to be on Google and YouTube without managing separate campaigns

ai_programmatic_products.name: Targeted Display & Video
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Surround target audience with brand across websites, apps, and games
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: Place your brand on websites, apps, and games — reaching the right people at the right time based on their demographics, interests, browsing behavior, and location.
best_for: Businesses building broad local awareness
Businesses wanting to reach audiences by interest or behavior
Complement to search for full-funnel coverage
Businesses that want multiple audience targeting methods
key_benefits: Multiple targeting methods: demographics, interests, content adjacency, retargeting, location
Cross-platform delivery via display ads or pre-roll video
Surrounds target audience wherever they spend time online
Cost-effective reach vs. premium placements
trigger_phrases: I want my ads to follow people around the web
I want to reach my audience everywhere they go online
I want to build awareness beyond just search and social

ai_programmatic_products.name: Retargeting
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Re-engage people who have already visited your website
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: Stay in front of people who've already shown interest in your business — delivering follow-up ads that bring them back when they're ready to decide.
best_for: Businesses with website traffic that isn't converting
Higher-consideration purchases where customers research before buying
Businesses with multiple products or services to cross-sell
Complement to any awareness campaign
key_benefits: Reaches people who've already expressed interest — higher conversion probability
Keeps your brand top-of-mind during the research and decision phase
Cross-platform delivery via display ads or pre-roll video
Highly efficient spend — only reaches warm audiences
trigger_phrases: People visit my website but don't call or buy
I want to follow up with people who've looked at us online
I want to stay in front of prospects after they leave my site

ai_programmatic_products.name: CRM Matching / Look-Alike Modeling
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Use existing customer data to re-engage known customers and find new ones like them
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: Upload your customer database to reach current customers across digital channels, or build a look-alike audience of new prospects who share the same profile as your best customers.
best_for: Businesses with an existing customer list or CRM data
Businesses wanting to re-engage lapsed customers
Franchise or multi-location businesses with customer data
Businesses wanting to scale beyond their current customer base
key_benefits: Target your actual customers across digital platforms with precision
Build look-alike audiences using Townsquare's 1st-party and 3rd-party data
Win back lapsed customers with tailored messaging
Match-back reporting can connect campaigns to actual sales
trigger_phrases: I want to re-engage past customers
I have a customer list — can I use it for advertising?
I want to find more customers who look like my best ones

ai_programmatic_products.name: Native Advertising
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Place branded content naturally within publisher pages to build trust and drive engagement
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: Integrate your message directly into local and national publisher sites with placements that mirror the editorial content around them — building trust by association and driving readers to your content.
best_for: Businesses with a content story to tell (home services, health, finance)
Businesses wanting to educate before the sale
Complement to display for higher-engagement reach
Categories where trust is a key purchasing factor
key_benefits: Seamless integration — matches publisher look and feel, increasing credibility
Higher engagement than standard display ads
Drives consumers to branded content that builds trust
Cross-platform delivery via video or display
trigger_phrases: I want my advertising to not look like advertising
I want to tell the story of my business
I want something that builds trust, not just impressions

ai_programmatic_products.name: Social Display
ai_programmatic_products.goal: Extend social content reach beyond Facebook to display networks
ai_programmatic_products.positioning: Deliver your social posts as standard display ads across the web — so consumers see your social content on websites outside of Facebook, reaching targeted audiences wherever they browse.
best_for: Businesses with strong social creative they want to extend
Complement to social campaigns for broader reach
Businesses wanting higher-engagement display alternatives
key_benefits: Social posts appear on websites outside Facebook — unusual format that grabs attention
Higher engagement than standard display ads
Targeted reach by demographics or interests outside the social platform
Leverages existing social creative — no additional production needed
trigger_phrases: I want my Facebook content to reach people beyond Facebook
I want my social posts to work harder

social_media_products.name: Facebook / Instagram Marketing
social_media_products.goal: Awareness, interest, and conversion through social targeting
social_media_products.positioning: Facebook and Instagram advertising lets you reach highly specific local audiences based on demographics, interests, and behaviors — building awareness and driving action where your customers are already spending time.
best_for: Businesses targeting specific demographics (age, income, family status, interests)
Businesses running promotions, events, or seasonal offers
Beauty, fitness, restaurants, retail — visually-driven categories
Businesses that want retargeting (reaching people who've visited their site)
key_benefits: Precise targeting — reach people by age, location, interests, and behaviors
Visual storytelling — video and image ads that stop the scroll
68% of U.S. adults use Facebook daily — massive local reach
Measurable KPIs: awareness, engagement, video views, site traffic
trigger_phrases: I want to get in front of a specific audience
I want to promote a special offer
My customers use Facebook and Instagram
I want video ads that people actually see

seller_language.use: targeted reach, audience matching, social presence, video storytelling

social_media_products.name: Facebook / Instagram Lead Gen
social_media_products.goal: Capture real-time leads directly from Facebook and Instagram
social_media_products.positioning: Capture leads directly inside Facebook and Instagram — prospects fill out a form without ever leaving the platform, giving you real customer information for immediate follow-up.
best_for: Service businesses that need lead capture (home services, med spa, financial)
Businesses without a strong landing page or website
High-intent categories where immediate follow-up matters
Businesses running promotions or consultations
key_benefits: No landing page required — lead forms built inside Facebook
Real-time lead capture with immediate prospect information
Pre-filled forms lower friction for the consumer
High-intent users — connecting with people most likely to convert
trigger_phrases: I need more leads from social media
My website doesn't convert well
I want to capture contact info directly from social

social_media_products.name: Facebook / Instagram Conversions
social_media_products.goal: Drive specific conversion actions on website — purchases, form fills, bookings
social_media_products.positioning: Drive significant actions on your website — purchases, form fills, appointments — by targeting social users who are ready to convert, with precision timing and messaging.
best_for: E-commerce businesses
Service businesses with online booking
Businesses running time-sensitive offers
Complement to awareness campaigns to close the loop
key_benefits: Targets users at the moment they're ready to take action
Precision targeting — right audience, right time, right offer
Drives purchases, form fills, appointments directly
Real-time relevance — delivers timely offers that prompt action
trigger_phrases: I want people to actually book or buy, not just see my ad
I want my social ads to drive real conversions

social_media_products.name: TikTok Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Reach a younger, engaged audience through creative video content
social_media_products.positioning: Connect with an entertained, engaged audience on the fastest-growing video platform — using creative, authentic video content to build brand visibility and drive interaction with younger consumers.
best_for: Businesses targeting 18-35 demographics
Visually compelling categories: food, beauty, fitness, entertainment
Businesses with strong video creative or brand personality
Brands wanting to reach audiences through influencer-style content
key_benefits: Highly engaged audience — TikTok is used as a self-learning and discovery tool
Target by interests and the influencers audiences follow
High interaction rates vs. other platforms
Creative formats that feel native, not intrusive
trigger_phrases: I want to reach younger customers
I want to be on TikTok
I want fun, engaging video content

social_media_products.name: LinkedIn Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Reach business professionals and decision-makers for B2B or professional services
social_media_products.positioning: LinkedIn's deep professional data lets you target decision-makers, business owners, and professionals by title, industry, company size, and seniority — ideal for B2B or professional service businesses.
best_for: B2B businesses selling to other businesses
Professional services: legal, financial, consulting, staffing
Businesses recruiting specific professional profiles
Higher-value sales requiring decision-maker access
key_benefits: Target by job title, industry, company size, and seniority
Direct access to decision-makers who rarely see other ads
Professional context — ads appear in a credible business environment
Cross-platform delivery via display or video
trigger_phrases: My customers are business owners or executives
I'm selling to other businesses
I want to reach decision-makers

social_media_products.name: Nextdoor Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Build neighborhood-level brand presence and local community trust
social_media_products.positioning: Reach hyper-local audiences on Nextdoor — a community platform where neighbors share recommendations and local service providers — building authentic trust in your immediate market area.
best_for: Local service businesses: home services, cleaning, landscaping
Businesses that thrive on community reputation and referrals
Businesses targeting specific neighborhoods or zip codes
New businesses establishing local presence
key_benefits: Authentic community environment — neighbors actively sharing recommendations
High-trust context — community-driven content builds brand rapport
Hyper-local targeting — neighborhood and zip-code level precision
Reaches homeowners in a purchase-intent mindset
trigger_phrases: I get most of my business from word of mouth in my neighborhood
I want to build my reputation locally
I want to reach homeowners in specific neighborhoods

social_media_products.name: Pinterest Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Reach audiences actively planning projects and purchases
social_media_products.positioning: Pinterest reaches users at the moment they're planning — home renovations, weddings, events, seasonal purchases — associating your brand with their creative and buying process before they've decided where to buy.
best_for: Home improvement, interior design, renovation
Weddings, events, catering
Fashion, beauty, retail
Seasonal businesses where planning starts early
key_benefits: 85% of weekly U.S. Pinners use Pinterest when planning new projects or purchases
Reaches high-intent planners before the purchase decision is made
Visual format — ideal for products and services with strong visual appeal
Less competitive than Facebook/Instagram in some categories
trigger_phrases: My customers plan ahead before buying
I'm in a category where people do a lot of research
I want to reach people who are actively planning a project

social_media_products.name: Snapchat Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Reach a younger, mobile-first audience with playful, engaging content
social_media_products.positioning: Connect with a younger, mobile-savvy audience on Snapchat using playful, immersive ad formats that fit naturally into how Gen Z and younger Millennials communicate.
best_for: Businesses targeting 13-30 demographics
Entertainment, food, beauty, fashion categories
Businesses with creative, visually engaging content
key_benefits: Unique reach among 13-30 demographics not easily accessible elsewhere
Immersive, full-screen ad formats with high engagement
Mobile-first platform — reaches users throughout the day
trigger_phrases: I want to reach teens and young adults
I'm in a category that skews young

social_media_products.name: X (Twitter) Advertising
social_media_products.goal: Reach active, opinionated users engaged in real-time conversations
social_media_products.positioning: Be part of every trending conversation — X advertising captures active, engaged users discussing current events, news, and their interests in real time.
best_for: News, media, and current events-adjacent businesses
Political or advocacy campaigns
Businesses targeting engaged, opinionated audiences
Real-time offers tied to events or news moments
key_benefits: Real-time buzz — reach users engaged with current events
Active audience that tends toward high engagement
Unique targeting around interests, keywords, and trending topics
trigger_phrases: I want to reach people who follow news and current events
I have something timely to promote

streaming_tv_products.name: Streaming Television (STV)
streaming_tv_products.goal: Deliver non-skippable video ads to cord-cutters on streaming platforms
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Reach consumers who've cut the cord — watching on Sling, Pluto, Tubi, Roku, Amazon Fire, and more — with :15 and :30 non-skippable video ads. 87% of U.S. households now have a Connected TV device.
best_for: Businesses that used to advertise on cable TV
Categories where a commercial-style message builds trust
Businesses wanting to reach cord-cutters where cable TV can't
Any business that can tell their story in :15 or :30 seconds
key_benefits: Non-skippable ads — viewers must watch your message before their content
Precise targeting: demographics, interests, behaviors, or channel type (news, sports, etc.)
87% of U.S. households have a Connected TV device
Reaches the 46M+ households who have cut the cord
trigger_phrases: I want to be on TV but cable is too expensive
My customers watch streaming services, not cable
I want to run video commercials without the traditional TV price tag

streaming_tv_products.name: Audience Targeted STV
streaming_tv_products.goal: Deliver STV ads to specific audience segments — not just geographic zones
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Go beyond geography — deliver STV commercials specifically to in-market audiences defined by age, gender, household income, interests, and hundreds of behavioral signals.
best_for: Any budget level — accessible entry point to STV
Businesses wanting audience precision over broad reach
Complement to channel-targeted STV
key_benefits: In-market targeting, age, gender, HHI, and many more data points
Geo-targeted at state, DMA, or zip code level
Custom frequency capping — control how often consumers see your ad
Great consideration-stage product with flexible targeting
trigger_phrases: I don't want to pay for people who will never be my customer
I want smart audience targeting on streaming TV

streaming_tv_products.name: STV Retargeted Display
streaming_tv_products.goal: Follow up STV-exposed households with display ads on their personal devices
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Households that saw your streaming TV commercial then receive follow-up display ads on their phones, tablets, and computers — reinforcing your message across screens and moving them toward action.
best_for: Businesses running STV campaigns wanting to extend impact
Higher-consideration categories where multiple touchpoints matter
Full-funnel campaigns combining TV awareness with direct response
key_benefits: Extends STV reach from the TV to every personal device in the household
Reinforced frequency and recall — more touchpoints strengthen brand recognition
Personalized display ads served to households already exposed to your TV creative
Moves audiences from awareness to consideration to action
trigger_phrases: I want my TV ads to work harder
I want to follow up with people who saw my streaming ads

streaming_tv_products.name: Hulu Advertising
streaming_tv_products.goal: Premium STV placement on Hulu with extensive targeting options
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Access Hulu's massive, premium streaming audience with detailed targeting — reaching subscribers across a diverse library of on-demand and live content in a brand-safe environment.
best_for: Businesses wanting brand-safe, premium streaming placement
Broad audience reach with demographic refinement
Complement to other STV products for extended reach
key_benefits: Massive reach — one of the largest streaming audiences in the U.S.
Precise targeting: geography, demographics, interests
Premium, brand-safe content environment
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise on Hulu
I want premium streaming TV placement

streaming_tv_products.name: YouTube TV Advertising
streaming_tv_products.goal: Reach live and on-demand YouTube TV audience — no ad-free option available
streaming_tv_products.positioning: YouTube TV currently has no ad-free subscription option — meaning your message reaches every subscriber. Deliver ads to a broad, engaged audience across live and on-demand content.
best_for: Businesses wanting guaranteed ad exposure to all subscribers
Broad demographic reach with geographic precision
Live sports and news audiences
key_benefits: No ad-free tier means every subscriber sees your ad
Demographic targeting: age, parental status, HHI, and more
Geo-targeting: state, DMA, city, and zip code
Frequency capping available to manage exposure
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise on YouTube TV
I want to reach live TV viewers

streaming_tv_products.name: Netflix Advertising
streaming_tv_products.goal: Stand out with limited inventory on Netflix's massive audience
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Netflix's limited advertising inventory means less competition and more attention — reaching a highly engaged audience that actively discovers and watches content through AI-driven recommendations.
best_for: Businesses in large geographies wanting maximum reach
Brands wanting prestige placement
Broad awareness campaigns with limited frequency requirements
key_benefits: Limited ad inventory creates higher attention and less clutter
Highly engaged audience — Netflix's AI keeps people watching
Frequency capping: 3 impressions per day, 14 per week, 40 per month
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise on Netflix
I want prestige placement with a premium audience

streaming_tv_products.name: Live In-Game Sports Advertising
streaming_tv_products.goal: Reach passionate sports fans during live game broadcasts on streaming
streaming_tv_products.positioning: Sports remain the last appointment viewing experience — fans watch live and stay engaged through ads. Advertise during live professional and college game broadcasts on streaming platforms.
best_for: Businesses targeting sports fans (male 25-54 skew for most sports)
Auto dealerships, home services, financial services, food and beverage
Businesses wanting a high-energy, brand-safe environment
Seasonal campaigns aligned with major sporting events
key_benefits: Sports is the last appointment viewing — highest viewer engagement vs. other content types
Fans pay closer attention to ads during live sports than on-demand content
Targeting by team, league, and multi-sport available
State and DMA geo-targeting
trigger_phrases: I want to reach sports fans
I want to advertise during game broadcasts
My customer is typically a sports fan

amped_local_brands._description: AMPED = Townsquare's owned media advertising products using local radio station websites, apps, and social channels. These reach Townsquare's loyal local radio audience across digital touchpoints. In Townsquare markets, radio + online radio reaches 50%+ of adults weekly; with AMPED, over 70%.
amped_local_brands.headline_positioning: AMPED lets you leverage the power of trusted local radio brands — the most visited local websites and apps in your market — to reach engaged, loyal local audiences who already know and trust these voices.

products.name: Mobile App Sponsorship
products.goal: Awareness and Interest — high-impact, high-frequency ownership position
products.description: Sponsor Townsquare's local radio station apps to reach the most devoted local audiences. Your brand appears as a loading screen for 7 seconds when the app opens — guaranteed first impression before any content loads.
key_features: 7-second brand ownership position on app open — before any content loads
First impression plus anchored ad unit (refreshes every 1,000 pixels of scrolling)
Reaches most engaged local audience — people who choose to listen via app
products.best_for: Businesses that want a premium, high-visibility local brand position with the most loyal radio listeners.

products.name: Local Display
products.goal: Awareness — reach engaged local audience on individual station site
products.description: Align your message with the credibility and influence of a Townsquare radio station with digital banner ads on that station's website — reaching the local audience that comes for news, events, and music.
key_features: Hyper-local reach on the most visited local station site in the community
Multi-platform: runs on both desktop and mobile sites
Increased recall: pairing on-air spots with digital ads boosts consumer memory
products.best_for: Businesses building brand awareness locally. Strong complement to on-air radio campaigns.

products.name: Local Display Network
products.goal: Awareness — broad local reach across ALL Townsquare station sites in the market
products.description: High-impact digital display advertising across all Townsquare radio station websites in the market simultaneously. Reach the full local audience wherever they go for news, events, and music.
key_features: Reach across all local Townsquare station sites in the market simultaneously
Trusted environments — ads appear alongside well-known local media brands
Efficient CPM — more impressions for budget vs. programmatic alternatives
Multi-platform: desktop and mobile
products.best_for: Businesses building brand awareness across the full local market. Strong complement to SEM and social.

products.name: Ignite Display Network
products.goal: Awareness — geo-targeted display across Townsquare local, regional, and national brands
products.description: Reach consumers with geo-targeted display ads as they consume content across Townsquare's local, regional, and national brands — aligning your message with loyal audiences enjoying entertaining content.
key_features: Massive reach across all TSQ-owned properties
Precise targeting: geography, demographics, and interests
Content adjacency: your brand appears alongside trusted editorial content
products.best_for: Businesses wanting cost-effective display reach with content association across Townsquare's owned media network.

products.name: Ignite Video Network
products.goal: Awareness — video ads embedded in content across Townsquare properties
products.description: Reach consumers with video embedded into articles as they consume content on Townsquare's local, regional, and national brands — high-attention in-content video placement.
key_features: Video in-article placement — high attention context mid-content read
Massive reach across TSQ local and national content
Geographic and demographic targeting available
products.best_for: Businesses with video creative wanting high-attention video at lower cost than STV.

products.name: First Impression Site Takeover
products.goal: Awareness — maximum visibility for every single site visitor
products.description: Dominate the digital space by taking over Townsquare radio station websites for EVERY user when they first land on the page — ensuring every visitor from the dedicated listener audience sees your message.
key_features: Every first-time visitor sees your brand — not a percentage, every one
Strong brand recall — maximum visibility with the full loyal audience
High-impact display and site skin across desktop and mobile
products.best_for: Businesses with a time-sensitive message, major launch, or seasonal promotion needing maximum local visibility fast.
products.delivery: Display ads and site skin — cross-platform desktop and mobile

products.name: Content Sponsorship
products.goal: Awareness + Credibility — brand aligned with trusted local editorial content
products.description: Align your brand with high-quality content by sponsoring relevant articles, videos, and other media created by Townsquare's local editorial team — positioning your brand as a content provider, building trust through association.
key_features: Brand integration with quality, professionally curated local content
Enhanced credibility — sponsors are seen as providing valuable community content
Increased engagement — audience actively reading is highly attentive to adjacent ads
products.best_for: Businesses wanting to build credibility through local content association rather than standard advertising.

products.name: Sponsored Social Mentions (SSM)
products.goal: Awareness and Interest — authentic reach through trusted local voices
products.description: Boost your brand's visibility and credibility by having it promoted by one of the most trusted resources in the community — Townsquare's local radio station brands and their DJs, the original local influencers.
key_features: Authentic reach — leverages trust and influence of local DJs and station brands
DJs are the original local influencers — endorsements drive genuine consumer interest
Targeted — cross-platform posts targeting specific local audiences on Facebook/Instagram
products.best_for: Businesses that want to build credibility and trust quickly through local community voices. Strong for events, promotions, grand openings.
products.delivery: Cross-platform via video, static image, or carousel

products.name: Digital Endorsements
products.goal: Awareness + Credibility — immersive brand experience through DJ content
products.description: A step beyond SSM — DJs and station personalities actually experience your business, products, or services and create authentic content about it. Mix of organic and paid posting for maximum reach.
key_features: DJs experience your business firsthand — creating authentic, story-driven content
Playful, high-engagement format that separates your business from competitors
Mix of organic and paid postings to maximize local reach
Links to custom-created content on station websites
products.best_for: Restaurants, local attractions, fitness studios, or any business with an experiential component that tells well as a story.
products.delivery: Cross-platform: custom content + sponsored Facebook ad linked to content

products.name: Listen Live 2.0
products.goal: Awareness — reach at-work online radio listeners
products.description: Capture the attention of online radio listeners with engaging pre-roll videos and anchored ad units — ideal for reaching a primarily at-work, captive audience who listens while working.
key_features: Pre-roll video during commercial breaks — captures listener attention before content
1st-party data allows delivery on the best station to reach the right audience beyond just format
At-work audience — captive listeners with higher receptivity during the workday
products.best_for: B2B businesses, professional services, or any business targeting working adults during the workday.
products.delivery: Pre-roll video and display ads, cross-platform

products.name: 360 Studio Sponsorship
products.goal: Awareness + Top-of-Mind — ownership position across all station touchpoints
products.description: A comprehensive sponsorship across all of a radio station's digital and on-air elements — keeping your brand top-of-mind for listeners and sending a strong competitive signal in the market.
key_features: Brand co-association with a popular local station across all touchpoints
Frequent mentions and brand integration across digital and on-air
Top-of-mind positioning — listeners associate your brand with their favorite station
products.best_for: Established local brands wanting a dominant, differentiated position in the market. Sends a strong competitive signal.
products.delivery: Integrated across digital and radio elements

location_based_products.name: Geofencing with Foot Traffic Attribution
location_based_products.goal: Target consumers based on physical location and measure store visit lift
location_based_products.positioning: Place a virtual fence around any location — competitor lots, event venues, relevant businesses, neighborhoods — deliver ads to people who enter that zone, then measure how many actually visit your store.
best_for: Retail and brick-and-mortar businesses
Businesses wanting to target competitor locations
Auto dealerships, home improvement, restaurants
Event-driven businesses and seasonal campaigns
key_features: Target fence options: competitor locations, event venues, neighborhoods, relevant businesses, mixed-use spaces
Foot traffic attribution: proves which ad exposures drove actual store visits
Real-time targeting — reaches people at the moment they're in relevant locations
key_benefits: Conquesting: target people who visit your competitors
Closed-loop attribution — see the direct connection between ad spend and store visits
Highly relevant messaging delivered at the moment of location-based intent
trigger_phrases: I want to target people who go to my competitors
I want to know if my ads are actually bringing people in
I want to reach people near my store

location_based_products.name: Addressable Geofencing
location_based_products.goal: Target specific households with personalized ads across all devices
location_based_products.positioning: Deliver STV commercials, pre-roll video, or display ads to specific households by address — using curated lists from CRM data, direct mail lists, or demographic profiles for true household-level precision.
best_for: Businesses with a customer list or direct mail database
High-value, high-consideration purchases (home services, financial, medical)
Franchise systems wanting to target known households
Businesses combining digital with direct mail
key_features: Household-level precision — target specific homes, not just zip codes
Works with: custom audiences, direct mail lists, CRM data, subscription lists, political databases
Delivers STV, pre-roll video, and display ads across all household devices
Foot traffic attribution available when appropriate
trigger_phrases: I want to target specific households
I have a direct mail list — can I use it for digital advertising?
I want to reach homeowners in specific areas

location_based_products.name: Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH)
location_based_products.goal: Reach consumers in physical spaces through digital screens
location_based_products.positioning: Place your brand on digital screens where people are already waiting and paying attention — gas pumps, convenience stores, bars, cafes, gyms, salons, and medical offices.
best_for: Businesses wanting high-frequency local brand impressions
Categories relevant to the DOOH venue (health brands in gyms, food in cafes)
Businesses wanting to reach captive audiences in specific environments
key_features: Delivery options: gas pumps, convenience stores, bars, cafes, gyms, salons, medical offices
Captive audience — people waiting and not distracted by a phone
High-frequency local impressions at point-of-consideration
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise in local businesses
I want to reach people at gas stations or gyms
I want my brand visible in the community beyond online

other_channels.name: YouTube TrueView
other_channels.goal: Deliver skippable pre-roll video to engaged, research-mindset YouTube viewers
other_channels.positioning: Hold viewers' attention right before the video they're searching to watch — reaching a learning-mindset audience that uses YouTube to research and discover products and services.
best_for: Businesses whose customers research extensively before buying
Categories with an educational component (home services, medical, auto)
Businesses with compelling video creative
Complement to SEM for full Google ecosystem coverage
key_benefits: Viewers are in a learning mindset — higher receptivity to informative messages
Pay only when targeted users watch the full :15 or :30 second ad
Skipped ads are delivered at no charge but still build brand awareness
Target by audience demographics, interests, and specific YouTube channels
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise on YouTube
I have a video I want people to see
My customers do a lot of research before choosing

other_channels.name: Email Marketing
other_channels.goal: Deliver messaging directly to inboxes of targeted prospects
other_channels.positioning: Deliver your offer directly to the inbox of targeted prospects in your area — reaching people who match your ideal customer profile with a personal, high-ROI channel that drives direct response.
best_for: Businesses with a time-sensitive offer or promotion
Businesses targeting a specific demographic profile
Complement to social and display campaigns
Businesses wanting measurable direct response with match-back
key_benefits: Delivered directly to inbox — one of the highest-ROI digital channels
Match-back reporting available: connect email sends to actual sales
Optional add-ons: pre-targeting, retargeting, push-to-opener, direct mail
Precise demographic targeting for the audience list
trigger_phrases: I want to send an offer directly to potential customers
I want to reach people by email
I have a promotion I want to get in front of the right people

other_channels.name: Programmatic Audio
other_channels.goal: Reach highly engaged audio streaming audiences with non-skippable audio ads
other_channels.positioning: Reach a highly engaged audience with non-skippable audio ads on streaming platforms like Spotify — delivered alongside music, podcasts, and premium audio content.
best_for: Businesses wanting audio brand awareness beyond traditional radio
Complement to on-air radio campaigns
Businesses targeting commuters, exercisers, or at-work listeners
Categories with strong audio listening demographics
key_benefits: Non-skippable — listeners hear your full message
Runs alongside premium content: podcasts and music streaming
Mobile-first delivery to a highly engaged, attentive audience
Reaches audiences who have migrated from AM/FM to streaming audio
trigger_phrases: I want to be on Spotify
I want to reach podcast listeners
I want audio advertising beyond traditional radio

other_channels.name: Add to Wallet
other_channels.also_known_as: Digital Wallet Offers / Apple & Google Wallet
other_channels.goal: Convert promotions into digital wallet passes that drive repeat visits and measurable redemptions
other_channels.positioning: Turn your promotions into digital wallet offers that customers save to Apple or Google Wallet — with real-time push notifications, easy redemption, and in-depth reporting on actual coupon usage.
best_for: Retail, restaurant, beauty, and service businesses running promotions
Businesses wanting to drive repeat visits and loyalty
Businesses replacing paper coupon programs with digital tracking
Franchise systems wanting measurable promotion performance
key_benefits: Managed redemptions with full in-app push communication to customers
Redemption-level reporting — know exactly which offers drove results
Drives repeat purchases and long-term loyalty
Versatile delivery: most digital platforms, QR codes, and direct links
trigger_phrases: I want to run a digital coupon program
I want to track how many people actually redeem my offers
I want to build customer loyalty and repeat visits

other_channels.name: Direct Match
other_channels.goal: Reach homeowners with direct mail and extend the message across all digital platforms
other_channels.positioning: Combine the tangibility of direct mail with the reach of digital — targeting households by intent, home value, and demographics, then following up digitally across all screens with closed-loop attribution.
best_for: Home services businesses: HVAC, roofing, plumbing, landscaping
Businesses wanting to reach homeowners with high precision
Businesses combining traditional mail with digital integration
Franchise and multi-location businesses that need scale
key_benefits: Household precision: target by intent, home value, build year, HHI, and more
Digital integration: extends direct mail messaging across all digital solutions
Closed-loop attribution: campaigns designed for trackable ROI and booked jobs
Enterprise-grade data with strict hygiene standards for accurate delivery
trigger_phrases: I want to reach homeowners in my service area
I do direct mail — is there a way to extend it digitally?
I want to target homes based on age or value

other_channels.name: Radio Advertising
other_channels.goal: Reach a broad, loyal local audience with an intrusive, emotional medium
other_channels.positioning: Radio reaches over 90% of the population each week — building top-of-funnel awareness with a loyal, emotionally connected audience that's captive and close to the point of purchase. In Townsquare markets, radio + AMPED reaches over 70% of adults weekly.
best_for: Businesses wanting mass local reach at an efficient cost
Businesses with a story or offer to tell through audio
Complement to digital campaigns for full-funnel coverage
Local businesses wanting a trusted voice in their community
key_benefits: Reaches over 90% of the population each week
In TSQ markets: radio + AMPED reaches 70%+ of adults weekly
Intrusive medium — reaches people while multitasking, closest to the point of purchase
Emotional and influential — audio builds trust and purchase intent
Townsquare Analytics measures radio campaign impact on web traffic and consumer response
trigger_phrases: I want to advertise on the radio
I want broad local reach
I want to reach people while they're in their cars

ignite_programs._description: Pre-packaged campaign programs combining multiple products designed to match specific business goals.

programs.name: Site GrowthEngine
programs.goal: Drive targeted website traffic with Facebook and SPARK AI simultaneously
programs.description: Combines Facebook Link Click ads with SPARK AI optimized for landing page views — a one-two punch driving targeted website traffic from both social and AI-powered programmatic channels.
programs.best_for: Businesses wanting to grow website traffic from multiple channels simultaneously.
trigger_phrases: I want more people coming to my website
I want website traffic from multiple channels

programs.name: Seasonal Spotlight
programs.goal: Boost seasonal business visibility across social, email, and local radio endorsement
programs.description: Built for businesses with a seasonal push — leverages local radio credibility (SSM), Facebook ads for direct traffic, and email to drive leads from a focused audience in the right window.
programs.best_for: Businesses with seasonal peaks, grand openings, or time-limited promotions needing fast local visibility.
trigger_phrases: I have a seasonal business
I need to promote a limited-time offer
I want to drive traffic during my busy season

programs.name: Brick and Mortar Booster
programs.goal: Drive foot traffic to a physical location using location-based targeting with attribution
programs.description: Targets potential customers based on where they are and where they've been, then measures the direct lift in store visits tied to the campaign — a clear, provable connection between ad spend and foot traffic.
programs.best_for: Retail, restaurant, salon, gym — any brick-and-mortar business wanting to grow store visits with measurable results.
trigger_phrases: I want more people in my store
I want to know if my ads actually bring people in
I want to target people near my location

programs.name: Brand Builder Pro
programs.goal: Build long-term brand awareness across social endorsement, video, and programmatic display
programs.description: A brand-building combo leveraging local radio trust (SSM), YouTube video for education and engagement, and programmatic display for surround-sound brand presence — laying the foundation for sustained customer relationships.
programs.best_for: Businesses investing in long-term brand building. Strong for new businesses establishing presence or established businesses refreshing their image.
trigger_phrases: I want to build my brand
I want to be known in my market
I want long-term brand awareness

programs.name: 1:1 Marketing
programs.goal: Reach a curated in-market audience with email + multi-channel digital follow-up
components: Targeted Display / Video / STV retargeting to email openers
programs.description: Email is deployed to a targeted consumer list, then those who open are retargeted across display, video, and STV for the next 30 days — creating a coordinated, household-level conversation. Match-back reporting can connect campaigns to actual sales.
programs.best_for: Businesses wanting coordinated outreach to a defined audience with full visibility into what's actually working.
trigger_phrases: I want to reach a very specific audience
I want to know which marketing actually drove sales
I want to combine email with digital follow-up

product_pairing_guidance.business_goal: Get more phone calls and leads NOW
Increase foot traffic to a physical location
Promote a seasonal offer or event
Reach cord-cutters and streaming TV viewers
Re-engage past customers or leverage CRM data
Build community trust and local credibility
